links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: suspicax is found in the western parts of Brazil's Mato Grosso and Mato Grosso do Sul states, in southeastern Bolivia, in western Paraguay, and in northern Argentina as far south as Santa Fe Province. The nominate subspecies primarily inhabits caatinga woodlands and scrublands
